2606.30296.title: ManimAgent: Self-Evolving Multimodal Agents for Visual Education
2606.30296.paper_summary: Multi-round reflection lets agents built on large language models recover from failures within a single task, but each task remains an isolated episode: lessons learned across many reflection rounds on one task are discarded before the next begins. We study this gap on a code-generation task: from a scientific paper section, the agent writes Python in the open-source Manim library to render a mathematical animation. We present ManimAgent, a self-evolving multimodal agent that carries reflection experience across tasks through a dual-channel Episodic Memory Bank grown entirely from its own task stream, with no weight updates and no human seeds. After each animation converges, a vision-language model scores the rendered keyframes; the resulting signals populate a positive channel M+ that stores success rationales as soft Reference Examples, and a negative channel M- that stores validated failure patterns as hard Known Pitfalls. On a fixed-probe evaluation against no-memory, matched-budget retrieval-augmented generation, and shuffled-memory baselines, blind human Pass@1 rises and reflection rounds fall as memory size grows. We will release the code, frozen memory snapshots, and the task stream.
2606.30296.paper_summary_zh: 多輪反思讓基於大型語言模型的代理在單一任務中從失敗中恢復，但每個任務仍然是一個孤立的事件：在一個任務上經過多次反思所學到的教訓在下一個任務開始之前會被丟棄。我們在一個代碼生成任務上研究這一差距：從科學論文的某一部分，代理使用開源的 Manim 庫編寫 Python 代碼以渲染數學動畫。我們提出了 ManimAgent，一個自我演化的多模態代理，通過一個完全由其自身任務流生成的雙通道情節記憶庫來跨任務攜帶反思經驗，無需權重更新和人類種子。在每個動畫收斂後，一個視覺-語言模型對渲染的關鍵幀進行打分；生成的信號填充了一個正通道 M+，該通道將成功的理由作為軟參考示例存儲，還有一個負通道 M-，該通道將經過驗證的失敗模式作為硬已知陷阱存儲。在與無記憶、匹配預算的檢索增強生成和隨機記憶基準進行的固定探針評估中，盲人 Pass@1 隨著記憶大小的增長而上升，而反思輪數則下降。我們將發布代碼、凍結的記憶快照和任務流。
2606.30296.author: Wenjia Jiang et.al.
2606.30296.authors: Wenjia Jiang, Zongyuan Cai, Yuanhang Shao, Chenru Wang, Boyan Han, Zhixue Song, Keyu Chen, Shengwei An, Xu Yang, Zhou Yang
